name: Chocolate makes you happy 3
short_description: Casual colorful physical puzzle with sweets, jumpers, teleports, accelerators and explosions
detailed_description:
Casual colorful physical puzzle with sweets and explosions.
The goal of the player is to keep the cookies on the chocolate bar for some time to pass the level.

In Chocolate makes you happy 3:
- 50 levels
- Explosions
- Jumpers
-Teleports
- Sweets
- Accelerators
- Colorful art
- Cool Soundtrack
- Achievements
